_comment: Canonical save namespace for Dropbox /saves. `consoles` = REAL Batocera system folder names (1:1 mirror of /userdata/saves/<system>, so batocera<->Dropbox needs no reconciliation). Seeded from batocera's NON-EMPTY save dirs (systems that actually hold saves, 2026-07-15); new consoles materialise lazily on first sync. Pluto owns this list; the @dropbox cloud picker shows it, and the Vue app imports it. `nodeConsoles` = which consoles each node can host (many-to-many: wii runs wii + gamecube; dc + vmu both serve dreamcast; ws covers wswan mono + wswanc colour). '*' = emulator host, serves any console. A node may map to a console not yet in `consoles` -- it appears once its saves first sync up.
